Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 4 

AGE 

LABEL: Age (in years) 

DESCRIPTION: Beneficiary age in years during the last month of enrollment in the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: AGE 

LONG NAME: AGE 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 3 

FILE(S): Annual DE base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual demographic and eligibility TAF 

VALUES: -1 through 125 

Null/missing = source value is missing or unknown
